title: Instruction Execution Cycle (Fetch-Decode-Execute)
description: A flowchart illustrating the fundamental steps the Basic Processing Unit (CPU) performs to process a single instruction.
relationships: PC provides address to MAR for Fetch
MAR fetches instruction from Memory to IR
Control Unit decodes instruction in IR
Control Unit sends signals to ALU and Register File to Execute operation
Result is written back to Register File or Memory
PC is updated to point to the next instruction
